message:
Implement slice operator using new executor API

Port slice to the new Operator<table_slice, table_slice> executor pattern,
consolidating slice, head, and reverse operators. The implementation
distinguishes between streaming mode (positive indices/stride) and buffering
mode (negative indices or stride) for optimal performance.

Key changes:
- Slice class extends new executor API with process/finalize lifecycle
- SliceArgs struct holds begin, end, stride parameters
- Streaming mode emits results immediately with early termination support
- Buffering mode collects all input, resolves negative indices in finalize()
- Both positive and negative stride supported
- Plugin class uses Describer<SliceArgs, Slice> for declarative argument handling
- ReversePlugin reuses Slice with preset stride=-1
- Add Describer constructor overload to support preset Args values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
